_meta.description: Real seed data for Life Drive, extracted from the owner's life-dashboard dump. Load idempotently on first run into the schema described in the build prompt. Life areas, effort estimates, and type (task vs project) for the loose items were inferred and are meant to be user-editable in the app.

household.name: Home base
household.note: Seed Markus + Sarah as members; kids are family members for delegation/calendar, not login accounts unless requested.

owner_profile._note: Seed onto the owner's profile (Markus). Drives auto-scheduling: place top-priority / deep-work tasks into the focus_windows first.

principles._note: The owner's curated life-lesson deck. Surface one per day on the Daily Drive, rotating, avoiding recent repeats. Grouped by the owner's own themes; 'area' is a suggested filter tag.
meaning_and_success: I don't experience life, I experience the life I focus on. Focus equals reality.
People will judge you either way, so you might as well live.
Every minute wasted in disorder is a dream delayed.
Order your thoughts, order your space, order your actions. Discipline your hours as if they were diamonds, because they are.
Time is the currency of greatness, and only those who spend it wisely ever buy freedom.
When you master your time, you master your life.
When your life is in order, your dreams no longer wait — they arrive.
Inspiration is perishable. Act on it immediately.
Wisdom is the discarding of vices and the return to virtue by way of knowledge.
Everything is more beautiful because we are doomed. You will never be more lovely than now, and we will never be here again.
Science is the study of truth, and math is the language of nature.
Impatience with actions, patience with results.
Enlightenment is the space between your thoughts.
Peace is happiness at rest; happiness is peace in motion.
Three decisions decide our moment and our life: what to focus on, what it means, and what I'm going to do.
Whatever you focus on becomes real for you, even if it isn't reality.
Ask of any setback: is this a gift to help me grow?
Success isn't sustained through tactics, it's sustained through transformation.
You don't get what you wish for, you get what you're willing to become.
Success is 5% strategy and 95% mindset.
Challenges are what make life interesting; overcoming them is what makes life meaningful.
The ultimate financial goal is freedom: the ability to do what you want, when you want.
Financial freedom is turning income into long-term assets that build forever.
The business of life is the acquisition of memories — spend money on our rich life.
Interpret ambiguous communication charitably. Give the benefit of the doubt.
action_and_consistency: The current environment programs the brain, but the clever brain can choose its upcoming environment.
It's not educated vs. uneducated; it's people who like to read vs. those who don't.
Your routine is your destiny in slow motion.
Your current life is just the scoreboard of millions of micro-decisions you've made.
The more prepared I am, the luckier I seem to be.
Greatness begins one early morning at a time.
Take consistent, imperfect action to get 1% better every day.
Consistency and patience are the keys to success.
Discipline is the bridge between thought and reality.
Motivation gets us started; habit keeps us going.
Every adversity carries with it the seed of an equal or greater benefit.
Determined imagination — thinking from the end — is the beginning of all miracles.
You don't work toward it, you go there: already there in your mind, then emotionally, then physically.
Lifestyle design is based on massive output. Increased output requires decreased input.
Most information is time-consuming, negative, irrelevant to your goals, and outside your influence.
Science applied is the engine of humanity.
health_and_bliss: To stay flexible is to stay young. Mobility is youth.
Desire is a contract you make with yourself to be unhappy until you get what you want.
Your most precious resource is energy. Protect it at all costs.
Freedom is having nothing to chase, nothing to prove, and nothing to hide.
Great minds discuss ideas; average minds discuss events; small minds discuss people.
Anything that triggers you is teaching you what part of yourself needs healing.
Judging a person doesn't define who they are, it defines who you are.
I am whole, worthy, strong, powerful, loving, free, and happy.
Sleep 7–9 hours, eat a small surplus of high-protein whole foods, train 2–3x a week, and apply progressive overload.
Follow your bliss. Do what makes you happiest in every moment.
Become more aware of my oneness with infinite intelligence — built through intentional repetition.
How to release anger: name it, breathe it, move it, done.
How you think creates how you feel; feeling becomes emotion, emotion becomes vibration, vibration becomes a magnet.
Only think about what you want; forget what you don't want; never speak about what you don't have.
If there's no enemy inside your mind, no enemy outside can harm you.
Don't look out the window, look in the mirror.
Do you. Do what you want and be good at it — just make sure it's good to you and for you.

workout_split._note: Recurring weekly. Seed as workouts keyed by day_of_week; regenerate each week. One-tap complete on the Daily Drive.
